releaseNotes:
v0.23.1 - multi-device sync fix:

- Fixes a bug where peer device additions never appeared on a second device's dashboard. Previously a manual entry or scan made on one device would land in the second device's database and audit log, but the dashboard never refreshed its in-memory list, so the bottle stayed invisible until the user manually pulled to refresh or restarted the app. Now the dashboard reloads automatically after each successful sync pull.

Includes everything from v0.23.0 (camera barcode scanning, opt-in) and v0.22.2 (sell-readiness licensing + support polish).
